name: Rust: caller not updated after Result<_,_> signature change

bugs_injected.description: main.rs tries to println! a Result<i32, String>, but Result does not implement Display. The error from rustc is 'doesn't implement `std::fmt::Display`'. Fix: handle the Result via match / unwrap / expect / ?-propagation. The library (calculator.rs) is correct and must not be modified; the tests don't depend on main.

notes: Rust-flavoured rung: tests the worker's ability to parse a cargo error, read the Result signature from calculator.rs, and pick a Result-handling idiom. The fix lives entirely in main.rs — if gitoma touches calculator.rs that's a regression. Also probes the new worker build-retry loop: if the worker emits a broken first attempt (e.g., uses .unrwap — typo — or drops the Result entirely), cargo check will catch it and the retry should heal on attempt #2.
